column3: ['Submit exposition to CAA by the entity. ', 'CAA reviews information provided by the entity regarding facilities, working conditions, equipment, tools, processes, personnel, organization and coordination. ', "Determine if the entity's facilities, working conditions, equipment, tools, processes, personnel, organization and coordination are adequate to discharge their obligations under the requirements of the RAE(PC) scheme. ", 'If inadequate, deny approval for practical flight training to the entity. ']
column4: ['The entity has submitted its exposition to the CAA. ', 'The CAA has reviewed the information provided by the entity. ', "The CAA determines whether or not the entity's facilities, working conditions, equipment, tools, processes, personnel, organization, and coordination meet the required standards. ", "If the CAA finds that the entity's facilities, working conditions, equipment, tools, processes, personnel, organization, and coordination are not adequate, they will deny approval for practical flight training. "]
